reviews.comment:
No podés pagar con la APP YPF si pedís factura A.
De esto te avisan una vez que solicitas factura A y ya realizaste la carga

(Translated by Google)
You can't pay with the YPF app if you request an invoice (type A). You'll be notified of this after you request an invoice and have already completed the purchase.
